title: Pin every adapter to its exact base and tokenizer
description: Record the base model version and tokenizer an adapter was trained on so it is only ever loaded or merged onto a compatible base.
body: Use when distributing or merging LoRA/PEFT adapters. Do not load an adapter onto a different base revision or tokenizer than it was trained against — weights misalign and quality silently drops. Actions: record the base model id/revision and tokenizer hash in the adapter metadata, validate compatibility before load or merge, and verify outputs match the training-time reference. Validation signals include adapter metadata resolving to the exact base and a parity check against a reference prompt set. Risk boundary: a mismatched merge corrupts the model invisibly; if the base or tokenizer cannot be confirmed, deny the merge and escalate.
